name: At-Tanzeel Schools

name: Limelight Nursery and Basic School
description: Islamic nursery and primary school established 27 July 2006 out of the quest for qualitative Islamic and Western education; teaches Islamic studies, Arabic and phonics alongside the Nigerian national curriculum with Montessori methodology.
evidence: Edusko school profile confirms Islamic/Arabic curriculum, Ikorodu location, phone and establishment date; profile image taken from the listing.

name: Al-Miftahul-Khoirhot Schools (A.M.K)

evidence: SchoolsCompass profile states it is an Islamic Montessori school with Tahfizh classes and gives the Adamo, Ikorodu address and phone.

name: Manaar Schools

address: Primary: Suwebatu Abisola Taiwo Close, Opposite Equitable Estate, Igbe Oloja, Ikorodu; College: Alhaji Tijani Street, Behind Saudi Mosque, Degolu, Igbe Laara, Ikorodu, Lagos
